summary: Recorded bounded local adviser-intervention evidence for M6 Alpha. Evidence uses 0 new human/external observation sessions, 2 local design review passes, and 6 reviewed deterministic batch runs from accepted local artifact hash 99d64950. It classifies useful, ignored, harmful-risk, and missing interventions; records no blocker defects; preserves no telemetry/network/personal-data collection; and routes historical/cultural concerns to historical_researcher or Human Gate before formal content acceptance.

tests_run.result: Working tree contains the expected REVIEW evidence diff in project/tasks/active/M6-ADVISER-INTERVENTION-EVIDENCE-001.json; after handoff creation it also contains this new outbox handoff.
Task list completed; M6-ADVISER-INTERVENTION-EVIDENCE-001 is REVIEW, owner gameplay_designer, summary Collect adviser intervention evidence for Alpha flows.
No dependency-ready tasks printed while M6-ADVISER-INTERVENTION-EVIDENCE-001 is in REVIEW.

tests_run.command: Adviser evidence lists session/run count, local privacy handling, intervention classifications, blocker/follow-up split, and no telemetry/network collection.
tests_run.result: Task evidence_summary records 0 new human/external sessions, 2 local review passes, 6 deterministic runs reviewed, local-only anonymous handling, useful/ignored/harmful/missing classifications, empty blocker_defects, bounded follow-ups, and telemetry/network/personal-data exclusion.

decisions: Classified current adviser evidence as useful for recognized-order goal framing, diplomacy/legitimacy/succession comprehension, policy/event context, and victory progress because the UI exposes candidate reasons next to terminal and system panels without auto-submitting commands.
Recorded ignored intervention risk for the wait-for-succession candidate because it is visible but has no-command state, lower score, and no new human sessions to measure actual ignore rate.
Recorded harmful-risk, not blocker, for raw reason-code and score-heavy presentation because it can obscure player-facing meaning while remaining useful for auditability.

Recorded missing intervention for direct campaign/postwar consequence guidance because surrounding M4/M6 panels and batch metrics expose the evidence, but the adviser candidate list does not directly cite supply, casualty, withdrawal, or postwar-risk tradeoffs.
Recorded no blocker defects and bounded follow-ups only; this task does not expand product scope, implement adviser behavior, add telemetry, collect personal data, or decide M6 exit.

Tagged COMPOSITE/FICTIONAL encyclopedia and map/policy framing as review markers only; any later formal names, symbols, language, cultural framing, or production encyclopedia copy routes to historical_researcher or Human Gate.
Preserved DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE and did not reopen manual node battle.
risks: Evidence confidence is limited: this task ran no new external or non-author participant sessions and therefore cannot measure actual acceptance, ignored rate, or harm rate.
Reason-code-heavy adviser output may be too opaque for first-time players unless future UI/design work adds plain-language labels.
Candidate scores are fixture ordering evidence, not final balance values; treating them as final could encourage formula hunting.
Direct campaign/postwar consequence advice is currently a missing intervention and should remain bounded follow-up, not a hidden global punishment.
Cultural/historical material remains tagged as COMPOSITE/FICTIONAL review context only; formal content acceptance requires historical_researcher or Human Gate routing.
requested_action: Independently review the M6 adviser intervention evidence for acceptance criteria, privacy boundary, local/deterministic evidence limits, blocker/follow-up split, cultural/historical routing, and no telemetry/network/personal-data collection. Return ACCEPT, REQUEST_CHANGES, or BLOCK; do not mark the task CLOSED from this writer handoff.
